objective: Improve restore-eval benchmark evidence fidelity without changing restore behavior or weakening the restore-time mx.eval safety barrier.

details: Keep the existing vlm_cache_restore_detail eval_ms field as the compatibility aggregate covering target collection plus barrier timing.
Add eval_collect_ms to isolate restore eval-target discovery and materialization counter collection.
Add eval_barrier_ms to isolate the mandatory restore-time mx.eval(...) call.
Carry both split fields through vlm_cache_restore_cost_model.
Do not alter eval target selection, record formats, restore assembly, or the mx.eval barrier.

decision.next_action: Use the split fields in the next retained VLM timing run to determine whether the observed restore eval_ms is dominated by target collection or by the actual mx.eval barrier before attempting another restore-materialization change.
